description.value:
You spend a minute attempting to escape from Danrasteian's device even as the contraption works to tighten its bindings and twist you into increasingly uncomfortable positions. Attempt a @Check[thievery|dc:24] check to manipulate connectors and fasteners on the device to degrade their hold, a @Check[acrobatics|dc:25] check to contort yourself into a more advantageous position, a @Check[athletics|dc:26] check to tug at the bindings and loosen their grip, or a @Check[reflex|dc:29] save to simply wriggle and stretch in an attempt to squirm free, with the following results. (Any bonus that applies to any attempt to Escape applies to these checks.) Once you earn 3 Freedom Points, you escape!

Critical Success You make significant progress toward escaping and earn 2 Freedom Points.

Success You're on the way to escaping and earn 1 Freedom Point.

Failure You fail to make any progress toward escaping and take @Damage[2d8[bludgeoning]] damage from being twisted up.

Critical Failure As failure, but @Damage[4d8[bludgeoning]] damage. In addition, you must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:24|options:inflicts:drained] save to resist having your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained] condition value increase by 1 as your bones begin to break and your joints start to dislocate.

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies
